title: Sprint-94 closeout (+1 rule, 3rd formal instance)

predecessorOutcomes: sprint-92: first formal closeout, zero retro-splits
sprint-93: second formal closeout, zero retro-splits

missions.title: Widen structuredData.fetch allow-list for v1.6.0 rollup schema_versions
Update normalizeCapabilities() + playground mirror for ConfidenceDecomposition shape

outcomes.playgroundMirror: n=2 duplication preserved (per s93 decision); tsc + vite build clean

missions.title: Fix map_create coercion-string compatibility (enum-map | type-cast | identity)

outcomes.schemaWidening: map.create.input.json + map.update.input.json accept coercion: string | null | CoercionDef
outcomes.passThrough: preserve string verbatim on persisted PropMapping; map.resolve emits coercionType=<string>, coercionDetail=null
outcomes.resolveValueSemantics: string coercion treated as value-level identity (no structured table to transform)

missions.title: Migrate rollup fixtures to v1.6.0 live reruns and re-gate

newGateAssertions: every projection_variant carries ConfidenceDecomposition (total + method + signals[])
explicit presentation count gate (catches stripe 12 caps -> 15 presentations drift)

deliverables.commitVerification: git log c467d23..HEAD shows 4 m-prefixed commits in dependency order (m01, m02, m03, m04)

qualityGates.fullSuiteParallel: flakey on 3-4 tests due to pre-existing test-isolation issue (registry-snapshot benchmarks + mapping benchmarks share artifacts/structured-data/component-mappings.json); not introduced by sprint-94
qualityGates.playgroundBuild: clean (370 kB / 83 kB gz; up from 283/78 due to ConfidenceDecomposition signals[] verbosity)
qualityGates.rollupGate: 7/7 v1.6.0 e2e tests green against live fixtures

openGaps: Full-payload map_create dry-run probe (projection_variants[] + propMappings[].coercion together) — pending synthetic smoke test, separable from sprint-94 scope

namedAntiPatterns.retroSplits: held — zero, third consecutive sprint at zero (s92, s93, s94)

carryForward: Pre-existing test-isolation housekeeping (registry-snapshot + mapping benchmark file pollution) remains a candidate for a future sprint; not blocking and not exacerbated by sprint-94.
Send Stage1 a full-payload map_create dry-run smoke confirmation once a synthetic payload is generated. Now unblocked by m03.

decisionsHigh: Append-vs-replace on the schema_version allow-list (kept old versions; back-compat at unit-test layer)
Normalizer unwraps ConfidenceDecomposition.total to scalar — does not propagate decomposition shape onto NormalizedProjectionVariant (downstream consumers + bridge stay scalar)
Coercion string accepted as any non-empty string (not enumerated) — forward-compat with future Stage1 labels without OODS schema PRs

Playground v15 rollup fixtures retired in favor of v16; back-compat coverage stays at the unit-test layer; bundle size growth (32K→80K linear, 52K→136K stripe) accepted as cost of richer decomposition payloads
Explicit presentation-count gate added to e2e (caught stripe v1.6.0 12caps→15presentations drift; will catch future divergence earlier)
